issues.title: CI Validation Pipeline — make check + GitHub Actions
issues.dod: make check runs lint, test, coverage-check, and mutate in order; GitHub Actions workflow runs make check on every push and PR; AGENTS.md documents make check as pre-commit requirement

issues.title: Add make check target to Makefile
issues.dod: make --dry-run check outputs lint, test, coverage-check, mutate commands in that order; check appears in .PHONY and help output

issues.title: Document make check in AGENTS.md as pre-commit requirement
issues.dod: AGENTS.md has a Before You Commit section between Key Commands and File Organization explaining make check and its four steps

issues.title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow running make check on push and PR
issues.dod: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists, YAML is valid, workflow triggers on push and pull_request, installs golangci-lint and gremlins via go install, runs make check
